message:
feat(ext-workloads,e2e): add hotspot matrix validation tests, interference scoring imports, and per-extension tool isolation benchmark

Concurrent agent contributions integrating new extension analysis capabilities:

ext_workloads.rs:
- Import interference matrix completeness reporting and pair key
  parse/format helpers from extension_scoring module
- Add stage_weight_component() helper for named-stage weight lookup
- Add hotspot_matrix_schema_rejects_stage_count_drift test ensuring
  schema validation catches missing stage entries
- Add hotspot_matrix_schema_rejects_unknown_hotspot_stage test ensuring
  unrecognized stage names are rejected

e2e_extension_lifecycle_perf.rs:
- Add per_extension_tool_isolation benchmark (225 lines) that measures
  tool-call latency per extension both in isolation and under composed
  load, producing interference matrices to identify which extensions
  suffer most from multi-extension contention

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
